differentials.name: Reduction in functioning lung tissue due to (a)  space-occupying process (eg, pneumonia, infarction) (b)  surgical removal of lung tissue
differentials.raw: Reduction in functioning lung tissue due to (a)  space-occupying process (eg, pneumonia, infarction) (b)  surgical removal of lung tissue

differentials.name: Process reducing overall volume of the lungs
differentials.raw: Process reducing overall volume of the lungs (eg, diffuse pulmonary fibrosis)

differentials.name: Inability to expand lungs due to (a)  muscular weakness (eg, poliomyelitis) (b)  increase in abdominal volume (eg, pregnancy) (c)  pleural effusion
differentials.raw: Inability to expand lungs due to (a)  muscular weakness (eg, poliomyelitis) (b)  increase in abdominal volume (eg, pregnancy) (c)  pleural effusion

differentials.name: Process reducing overall volume of lungs
differentials.raw: Process reducing overall volume of lungs

differentials.name: Process that occupies volume within alveoli
differentials.raw: Process that occupies volume within alveoli (eg, alveolar microlithiasis)

differentials.name: Process that elevates diaphragm (eg, ascites, pregnancy), usually associated with decreased TLC
differentials.raw: Process that elevates diaphragm (eg, ascites, pregnancy), usually associated with decreased TLC

Inability to expand lungs due to (a) mu: =  characteristic of air trapping and overinflation (eg, asthma, emphysema) Associated with:   increased TLC

context: =  characteristic of air trapping and overinflation (eg, asthma, emphysema) Associated with:   increased TLC √  normal level of inflation to 8th posterior rib (eg, diffuse pulmonary fibrosis)
